params.prompt: The exact same technological seed remains perfectly preserved. The distant external points previously discovered now begin forming deliberate and meaningful connections. Thin elegant pathways extend outward from the intelligence core. The connections are precise, intentional, and highly organized. The ecosystem is beginning to emerge but remains incomplete. The central intelligence remains dominant. The scene is still primarily about the core. The external structure supports the core rather than competing with it. No massive network. No dense web. No technological diagram. No infrastructure explosion. No visual overload. No holograms. No dashboards. No interfaces. No particles filling the environment. The connections should feel intelligent, purposeful, and restrained. Large negative space remains. Dark graphite environment. Luxury enterprise aesthetic. Museum-quality presentation. Photorealistic materials. Subtle blue, purple, and amber highlights. Premium cinematic push-in. Elegant reflections. The scene should feel like: An intelligent entity beginning to connect with the world around it. No morphing. No deformation. No shape change. No generic AI orb. No sphere. No cube. No crystal ball. No text. No logo. No watermark. No cyberpunk. No visual clutter. No sudden motion. No camera shake. No dramatic effects. No explosion. No smoke. No fire. No chaotic movement.
